# Evolution Martial Arts NL

> Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu, Kickboxing, and functional training in St. John's, Newfoundland.

## About

Evolution Martial Arts NL is a community-first martial arts academy located at 210 Kenmount Rd, St. John's, NL A1B 3R2. Founded in 2022 by Lead Instructor Dru Hillyard (Black Belt under Prof. Dan Guillemette and Prof. Steve Burgess, 15+ years in BJJ).

## Programs

- Gi Jiu-Jitsu Adult (14+): Structured drills, positional rounds, and live sparring
- No-Gi Jiu-Jitsu Adult (14+): BJJ, wrestling, and submission fundamentals
- Kickboxing (14+): Dutch-style pad work, bag drills, and conditioning
- Kids Jiu-Jitsu (Ages 4-8 and 9-14): Confidence-building, self-defence foundations
- Women's Jiu-Jitsu: Women-led BJJ class for all experience levels
- Randori / Open Mat: Coach-supervised sparring sessions

## Schedule

- Monday: Adult Gi (7-8 PM)
- Tuesday: Kickboxing (6-7 PM), Adult No-Gi (7-8 PM), Women's Jiu-Jitsu (8-9 PM)
- Wednesday: Kids 4-8 (5:30-6:15 PM), Kids 9-14 (6:30-7:15 PM)
- Thursday: Kickboxing (6-7 PM), Adult No-Gi (7-8 PM)
- Friday: No classes
- Saturday: Adult Gi (11 AM-12 PM), MMA Comp. Team (12-1 PM)
- Sunday: Kickboxing (11 AM-12 PM), Open Mat (12-1 PM)

## Membership Plans

- Unlimited Grappling Training: $138/month
- Unlimited Grappling & Striking: $172.50/month
- 2 Classes Per Week: $80.50/month
- Women's Only All Skills: $63.25/month
- Kids Jiu-Jitsu: $74.75/month
- Women's Cardio Kickboxing: $138/6-week program

All prices are tax-in. All memberships include open mat access.
